utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Hey honey , you got the kind with the little girl , you said we were gonna to get the kind with the baby .

emotion_cause.span: 1_you got the kind with the little girl , you said we were gonna to get the kind with the baby .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: No , you said the baby creeps you out .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: No , the little girl creeps me out .

emotion_cause.span: 3_No , the little girl creeps me out .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Why would the baby creep me out ?

emotion_cause.span: 5_Why would the baby creep me out ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Why would the little girl creep you out ?

emotion_cause.span: 6_Why would the little girl creep you out ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: You guys , I am sorry , could you please talk a little slower ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: This is going in your book ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Yeah , it is about relationships . You know ? The traps , the pitfalls , what not to do , keep going . This stuff is great !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: And how none of it matters when the people really love each other .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: And how people will believe anything you tell them as long as it is a compliment .
